titleStmt.title: SII 29.116: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 116. (A.R. No. B. 485 of 1961-62.) KERŪR, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built upon the platform in front of the Māruti temple.

The record is damaged and the top portion of which is broken and lost. It refers to the rule of a king (name lost) and to his subordinate (name lost) who is stated to be the lord of Kāḷanjara. It registers a grant of land, a house, a garden etc., to the god Mūlasthāna Koppēśvara of agrahāra Keṟevūr in Koravaḷḷi-150. The grant meant for the worship and offerings to the god and for the maintenance of the temple was made over to Vāmarāsi-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple. The grant was made by mahāpradhāna sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyaka Jayadēvayya, mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jayasiṁhadēva who was governing the manneya of Kūnḍi-3000, mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Kattamadēva, mahāmaṇḍaḷika Hemmāḍidēvarasa who was administering Koravaḷḷi division from Gōkāge and other mahājanas when mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kaḷachurya Bijjaladēva was in charge of the mēlāḷke of Kūnḍi-3000.
The record is dated Śaka 1071, Vibhava, Pushya, śu. [1]4 Thursday. It corresponds to 1148 A.D., December 26, Sunday. [The Śaka year was 1070].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpāda padmō
kāḷaṁjara puravarādhīśvaraṁ suva
kaḷacuryya kuḷakamaḷa mārttaṁḍa ka
pracaṇḍa mānakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁ kuśagaja sāmanta śaraṇā
jrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvara vairībha kaṁṭhīrava paranārī sahōdara giridurgga
kamalla nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara bijjala
kūṁḍi mūṟu sāvirada mēlāḷikeya nāḷuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samasta pra
sti sahitaṁ śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati daṁḍanāyakaṁ jayadēva
yyaṁgaḷu samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kūṁḍi mūrusāvirada maṁ
neyaṁ jayasiṁhadēvanuṁ samastaprasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kattamadēvanuṁ
samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷikaṁ koravaḷḷiya hemmāḍidēvanuṁ gōkāgeya
nelevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire koravaḷḷiya (nū)ṟayvattaṟa baḷiya
ya tammāḷikeya śrīmadagrahāraṁ keṟevūra prabhu janaṁ
sakavarṣa 1071 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 14 brihavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa
daṁdu keṟevūra mūlasthāna koppēśvaradēvara khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ nivēdyakaṁ Alli
yācāryyarvvāmarāsi paṇḍitargge śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ
gaḷuṁ jayasiṁhadēvarasaru kattamadēvarasaruṁ koravaḷḷiya heṁmāḍidēvarasaruṁ pra
bhu mukhya mahājanaṁgaḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ nā(divi)geya baṭṭeyiṁ baḍagalu
ḍalu bāviyiṁ teṁkalu naliṁ paḍuvalu koṁḍiya sāyira kamma keyya
(ka)yya maneyuṁ laṭṭiyana (hadi)yaṁ baḍagaṇa tōṁṭa
ṇabeyiṁ koṭṭaru kayyaṟuvaṇaṁ (vidanu) maṁ kāpu pratipāḷisu
varu Īdharmmama naḷidavaruṁ vāraṇāsi kṣētradalū kavileyaṁ
brāhmaṇarumaṁ kondāpātakamageydāparu . © svadatta paradattaṁ
(vā)yō harēta vasuṁdharā śaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyate krimi .
bhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādhibhiḥ yasyayasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
